properties.name: app.payment.kafka.topic-payment-events
properties.description: Kafka topic for payment events (outbound to risk engine).

properties.name: app.payment.kafka.topic-risk-events
properties.description: Kafka topic for risk engine responses.

properties.name: app.payment.kafka.topic-payment-completed
properties.description: Kafka topic for payment completed events.

properties.name: app.payment.metrics.payments-processed-total
properties.description: Micrometer counter name for total risk responses processed.

properties.name: app.payment.metrics.payments-compensated-total
properties.description: Micrometer counter name for total compensations (rejected by risk).

properties.name: aws.dynamodb.endpoint
properties.description: DynamoDB endpoint override for LocalStack. Leave empty for real AWS.

properties.name: aws.dynamodb.access-key-id
properties.description: AWS access key for LocalStack. Used when endpoint is set.

properties.name: aws.dynamodb.secret-access-key
properties.description: AWS secret key for LocalStack. Used when endpoint is set.
